calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Continued To Jun-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued to June 23, 2015, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. parties must deliver courtesy copies of the papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 8, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
